entry.title: photography
entry.content:
Engineer by trade, photographing the ordinary at night.

Cameras:

  • Nikon D90
  • Nikon D700
  • Fujifilm X-T30 II

Lenses:

  • Nikon 18-200mm F3.5-5.6 DX
  • Nikon 24-85mm F3.5-4.5 FX
  • Nikon 24mm F2.8D FX
  • Nikon 35mm F2.0D FX
  • Nikon 50mm F1.2D FX
  • Nikon 50mm F1.8D FX
  • Fujifilm 18-55mm F2.8-4.0 APS-C
  • Viltrox 27mm F1.2 APS-C
  • Viltrox 28mm F4.5 APS-C

Galleries:

  • flickr
  • flickr(old)
  • personal

Sites:

  • uly.me
  • javison.com
entry.summary: Engineer by trade, photographing the ordinary at night.
